summary: This is a very brief administrative post where Joel announces two things: he has been working on an improved online trial for FogBUGZ, and he is moving CityDesk-related news to a separate dedicated site to avoid boring readers who don't use CityDesk.
key_points: Joel built a new online trial experience for FogBUGZ bug tracking software
CityDesk news is being moved to its own dedicated site to keep the main blog focused
Shows awareness of audience segmentation - not all readers care about all Fog Creek products
money_quotes: Rather than post CityDesk news here, where it will surely bore those few remaining non-CityDesk-users to tears, I'm starting a new CityDesk News site.
key_insight: Product-specific news should be separated from a general-interest blog to avoid alienating readers.
